_comment: Single source of truth for ELO tier bands. Read by the backend (ranking_service.tier_bands_for + apply_tiers) and by the web frontend (positional-tiers.html, via GET /api/tier-config); mobile caches the same JSON at boot (utils/tierBands.ts). Every (scoring_format, position, tier) row carries a [min, max] ELO band. The backend's apply_tiers spreads ELOs linearly inside [min, max]; bucketing walks tiers top-down and assigns the first tier whose min <= elo (tier_for_elo).
_calibration: Recalibrated 2026-07-10 (FB #60/#69). Bands are anchored to the DynastyProcess consensus seed scale (data_loader: elo = 1200 + value/10000 * 600, so elo 1445 == DP value 4083 etc.), per position AND scoring format, targeting dynasty-sane occupancy from the current consensus pool: Elite = top ~5, Starter = to ~rank 15, Solid = to ~rank 30, Depth = anything with real consensus value, Bench = the near-zero tail (plus post-trio Elo below 1200 down to 1150; below 1150 = unranked, which keeps the no-value anchor at 1100 below every band). Occupancy is pinned by backend/tests/test_tier_occupancy.py against a checked-in DP snapshot — re-run it after editing these numbers.
